rationale.ai-review: Multi-agent LLM system simulating collaborative team for automated code review.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: QA-Checker prevents agents from prompt drifting away from review intent.
rationale.built-system: Implemented CodeAgent and evaluated it on a real PR dataset.
rationale.general-code: System reviews general human-written GitHub pull requests, not AI code.
rationale.risk-security: Evaluates system's ability to detect vulnerability introductions.
rationale.risk-quality: Evaluates format alignment, consistency, and revision suggestion capabilities.
